label: Transparent beluga whale motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a beluga whale profile motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single accurate beluga whale in calm side profile, rounded melon forehead, small dark eye, soft smiling mouth line, subtle pectoral flipper, smooth white skin with faint ice-blue shadowing and gentle pearlescent highlights. Clean healthcare system mood, serene and precise.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the whale nose, tail, back, belly, or flippers. Keep the body fully separated from the background.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves white skin detail, soft arctic sea coolness, clinical calm, no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no ocean scene, no ice floes, no bubbles, no second whale, no cartoon mascot, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Beluga" derived from the visible transparent beluga whale motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the beluga motif: white skin, soft ice-blue shadow, rounded melon profile, arctic sea calm, and clean healthcare system mood. The board must visibly respect these motif colors and the beluga profile.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9, target 3840x2160 high-resolution source board.
Resolution and legibility: 4K-class source board with large readable labels; avoid dense tiny text. Make all section titles and token names legible in gallery preview.
Required visible sections: Morphous Beluga title, motif story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance for healthcare product UI; use calm, clear labels and no long paragraphs.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, healthcare metric cards, line chart, bar chart, small donut chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, rounded but disciplined controls inspired by beluga anatomy, soft clinical surfaces, subtle arctic-water dividers, pearl highlights, calm accessible contrast.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals: beluga white, ice blue shadow, arctic cyan, slate ink, deep polar water, soft mist, pearl highlight, muted sea glass, gentle clinical signal.
Text: short readable UI labels; include English and Japanese guidance labels such as "English UI", "日本語UI", "Noto Sans JP", "Patient intake", "Vitals", "Care plan".
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no noisy ocean scene, no random brand logos, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Beluga".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Beluga design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent beluga motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Beluga board as references. Preserve the white beluga profile, soft ice-blue shadows, arctic sea calm, healthcare UI intent, rounded-but-disciplined controls, Japanese typography guidance, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9, target 3840x2160 high-resolution source board.
Resolution and legibility: 4K-class source board with large readable labels; avoid dense tiny text. Make section titles, palette names, token labels, and component labels legible in gallery preview.
Required visible sections: Morphous Beluga, Dark Mode, motif story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep polar water background, slate ink panels, ice-white text, beluga white surfaces, ice-blue focus rings, arctic cyan primary accents, sea-glass muted panels, pearl highlights, subtle water-ripple texture, crisp accessible card borders, calm healthcare data dashboard.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, sidebar navigation, healthcare metric cards, line chart, bar chart, small donut chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance, using short readable labels such as "English UI", "日本語UI", "Vitals", "Care plan", "Patient intake".
Constraints: no neon overload, no generic purple gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no noisy ocean scene, no random brand logos, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Beluga".
